_meta.assumptions: Descriptions are ORIGINAL (not copied from company sites). Factual fields (founded_year, employee_count band, headquarters) are from general public knowledge and should be re-verified before publishing. hiring_status is an editorial estimate: actively_hiring | selective | unknown. URLs are best-known canonical careers/LinkedIn pages — verify the careers_page resolves before going live.
_meta.loader: scripts/load-seed-data.ts maps these onto the current Prisma Company model.

companies.name: Sarvam AI
companies.description_short: India's full-stack GenAI lab building sovereign large language models for Indian languages.
companies.description_long: Sarvam AI develops foundation models, speech systems and agentic tooling tuned for India's languages and use-cases. The team works across pre-training, inference optimization and applied AI products, making it a magnet for engineers who want to work on frontier LLMs from India.
companies.seo_title: Sarvam AI Careers — Work on India's Foundation Models
companies.seo_description: Explore AI engineering and research roles at Sarvam AI, India's GenAI lab building large language models for Indian languages.

companies.name: Fractal Analytics
companies.description_short: Enterprise AI and decision-intelligence partner to Fortune 500 companies.
companies.description_long: Fractal blends machine learning, behavioral science and design to power decisions at global enterprises. With strong fresher and intern programs in data science, it's a popular entry point for analysts and ML engineers in India.
companies.seo_title: Fractal Analytics Careers — AI & Data Science Jobs in India
companies.seo_description: Fresher and graduate AI, ML and data-science roles at Fractal Analytics, a leading enterprise AI company.

companies.seo_description: Join Tiger Analytics for graduate data-science, ML and analytics-engineering roles across India and remote.
